subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is not a capital of a Rajasthan state?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में कौन से राजस्थान की राजधानी नहीं होती।
explanation_en: Alwar is not a capital of any Rajasthan state.
explanation_hi: अलवार राजस्थान के किस राजधानी हो नहीं।
explanation_en: Alwar is not a capital of any Rajasthan state.
explanation_hi: अलवार राजस्थान के किस राजधानी हों।
question_en: Which of the following is not the capital of a Rajasthan state?
